lootr.commands.create: Maed a majik bokz %s @ %s uzin da luut ting %s.
lootr.commands.summon: Maed a majik minecat @ %s uzin da luut ting %s.
lootr.commands.usage: /lootr barrel | barrel <loot-table> | chest | chest <loot-table> | cart | cart <loot-table> | shulker | shulker <loot-table> | convert | custom <id> | refresh | decay
lootr.message.cannot_break: Cat cannot brake boxz or minecatz, sry.
lootr.message.cannot_break_sneak: Boxz nd minecatz onlee b brokun by majikal god cats.
lootr.message.cart_should_sneak: WAIT! No brake majik minecatz liek dis! Brakin meenz u loze all thinkies inside and no one else can get deir tingies. If u rly wanna break, sneek brake
lootr.message.decay_in: Diz boxy tingy will go bye bye in %s sekondz.
lootr.message.decay_start: Uh ohz, u dids da Thanos on dis box! It will go away in %s sekindz.
lootr.message.decayed: Oh noes, da boxy tingie did a Thanos!
lootr.message.invalid_block: Dis blok dont know wut it is, so it gots no loots.
lootr.message.invalid_table: Teh majik list ov itemz [%s] had nuffin in it an' culdnt fill da boxy [%s]. Luuk in `latest.log` fur oopsies.
lootr.message.refresh_in: More tingiez will b hear in %s sekindz.
lootr.message.refresh_start: Da boxy will get new kat thingz in %s sekundz!
lootr.message.refreshed: Woah, more tinkies when ur paw touched it!
lootr.message.should_sneak: WAIT! No brake majik box liek dis! Brakin meenz u loze all thinkies inside and no one else can get deir tingies. If u rly wanna break, sneek brake.
lootr.message.should_sneak2: Bcuz luut iz [%s], onlee brake if u REELY REELY must.
